stories.title: My Name
stories.text: My name is Leo. I am a student.

stories.title: My Dog
stories.text: I have a small dog. His name is Max.

stories.title: Morning Food
stories.text: I eat eggs in the morning. I drink water with breakfast.

stories.title: My Friend
stories.text: My friend is very kind. We walk to school together.

stories.title: At Home
stories.text: I live in a small house. My room is clean and bright.

stories.title: My Day
stories.text: I wake up at seven. I eat breakfast with my family. Then I go to school.

stories.title: The Park
stories.text: I go to the park after school. I see birds in the trees. Children run on the grass. I feel happy there.

stories.title: Family Dinner
stories.text: My family eats dinner together at night. My mom makes rice and chicken. My dad tells a story. My sister laughs a lot. I enjoy this time.

stories.title: Weekend Fun
stories.text: On Saturday, I wake up late. I eat fruit and toast. My friend calls me in the morning. We go outside and walk together. Later, I watch TV at home. It is a good day.

stories.title: Learning English
stories.text: I study English every day. I learn new words in class. I read short stories at home. Sometimes I speak with my teacher. Sometimes I make small mistakes. That is okay for me. I keep trying every day.
